source.text: 照你说的办，直到完成所有 skills 的优化并在本地完成已有 skills 的更新然后提交到远程仓库

authorized_publish_target.mode: ordinary non-force push after verified local integration

authorized_scope: implement the bound Superzhao Adaptive Control Plane v2 design in this repository
update the existing managed Superzhao Skills in the local Codex profile after verification and backup
create ordinary local commits for this scope
perform one non-force push of the verified integrated result to the bound repository URL and destination ref
excluded_actions: open or update an upstream obra/superpowers pull request
destructive cleanup of user-owned branches, worktrees, files, or backups
publish scope not contained in the bound design
execution_condition: Recheck the final action, remote URL, destination ref, HEAD, profile digest, and changed-path scope at the point of installation or push. Material drift invalidates this record for that action.

provenance.model: GPT-5-class system identity; exact deployment identifier not exposed to the controller
provenance.note: This file is an agent-transcribed audit record of the user's instruction, not a cryptographic user signature.
